title: logformatter: futureproof output filename
body:
"Just this once", I thought, adding an obscure unmaintainable
duplication to the CI code. When will I learn?

This fixes the logformatter output filename to handle boltdb/sqlite.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Seems to be working. The case that most concerned me was rootless, because of envariable propagation, but that worked fine: https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5683841575157760/html/sys-podman-fedora-37-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html
@containers/podman-maintainers mergeme please. The absence of this is making my flake-catalog work more difficult.
